title: Acne in adolescent

treatment_and_management.text: Covers distribution, lesion types, scarring, hyperpigmentation, hormonal patterns, pain, prior treatment, and psychological impact.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Supports adolescent acne distribution, lesions, scarring, prior treatment and psychological impact for adolescent acne; no decision is generated.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Covers distribution, lesion types, scarring, hyperpigmentation, hormonal patterns, pain, prior treatment, and psychological impact.

exact_section.heading: 5.1 Virtual Clinical Assessment and Clinical History

medication.text: Specifies lesion type and severity, skin type, scarring, hyperpigmentation, menstrual or androgen context, products, medicines, treatment history, and psychological impact.
medication.rationale: Supports clinician-assessed acne severity and hormonal context for adolescent acne; no decision is generated.
medication.evidence_extract: Specifies lesion type and severity, skin type, scarring, hyperpigmentation, menstrual or androgen context, products, medicines, treatment history, and psychological impact.

referral.text: Lists scarring risk, depression or severe psychosocial impact, treatment non-response, endocrine concern, and severe or nodulocystic acne.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Age, onset, sites, lesion count, severity, menstrual context, products, treatment response, examination and clinician plan are absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for adolescent acne.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
